positive: A whimsical, stylized illustration featuring a majestic, golden-maned lion sitting regally on a crystalline pile of oversized gems. The lion is rendered with strong, clean silhouettes and minimal shading, using only geometric shapes and bold, contrasting color blocks of sapphire blue, emerald green, and vivid gold. The composition should be highly centered and symmetrical, designed to look excellent as a distressed circular patch or t-shirt graphic. Use a bold, mid-century modern graphic design style with thick outlines. High contrast, crisp lines, vector quality, flat color palette, perfect for screen printing.
